esp8266at_begin.message0: Init ESP8266 WiFi Module Baud Rate %1 Interface %2
esp8266at_begin.tooltip: Initialize SparkFun ESP8266 AT WiFi Shield, using global esp8266 object

esp8266at_is_connected.tooltip: Check if ESP8266 is connected to WiFi

esp8266at_local_ip.tooltip: Return local IP address string of ESP8266

esp8266at_tcp_connect.message0: ESP8266 TCP Connect Link ID %1 Server %2 Port %3
esp8266at_tcp_connect.tooltip: Establish TCP connection to specified server and port

esp8266at_tcp_send.message0: ESP8266 TCP Send Link ID %1 Data %2
esp8266at_tcp_send.tooltip: Send string data via specified TCP link
